summary: Backend testing complete for Store Detail Page, Independent Signup, and MMS features. All 19 tests pass (100%). Store detail page loads with users and available users, add/remove user functionality works. Independent signup gets status='active' and needs_onboarding=True, organization signup gets status='pending'. Twilio webhooks router was not included in server.py - fixed during testing.

minor.issue: Router was created but not included in server.py - FIXED during testing

critical_code_review_comments: SMS notification to super admin is MOCKED - uses Twilio API but the configured phone number in backend/.env may not be a valid Twilio number for sending (warning logged)
MMS media download requires valid Twilio credentials - will fall back to original Twilio URL if download fails
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added twilio_webhooks router import and include
seed_data_creation: None - test users created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All hierarchy APIs working: store detail page returns users, available_users, organization info. Independent signup creates users with status='active' and needs_onboarding=True. Organization signup creates users with status='pending'. Twilio webhook router is now properly included in server.py. MMS media endpoint exists at /api/messages/media/{media_id}.

features_tested.store_detail_page_loads: PASS - /api/admin/hierarchy/store/{id} returns store, users, available_users, organization
features_tested.store_detail_users_fields: PASS - Users have _id, name, email, role, is_active, store_ids
features_tested.store_detail_available_users: PASS - available_users list returned for adding users
features_tested.store_detail_org_info: PASS - Organization info included when store belongs to org
features_tested.independent_no_org_id: PASS - Signup without organization_id treated as independent
features_tested.org_signup_in_pending_list: PASS - Organization user appears in pending-users list
features_tested.pending_count_increases: PASS - Count increases after organization signup
features_tested.pending_count_unchanged_independent: PASS - Count unchanged after independent signup

mocked_apis.SMS notification: MOCKED - Super admin notification uses Twilio API but may fail due to invalid phone number configuration
mocked_apis.MMS download: MMS download from Twilio requires valid Twilio credentials - configured in backend/.env
